subcodes.first_line: O thou disseminator of the Covenant! The hosts of the Abhá Kingdom and the legions of the Supreme Dominion are descending successively from the realms above in a mighty rush [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناشر میثاق سپاه ملکوت ابهی و جنود جبروت اعلی متتابع از عالم بالا در هجوم
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @growth of the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
